meeting_title: Fort Worth City Council Day Meeting
location: Fort Worth City Council Chamber, 100 Fort Worth Trail, Fort Worth, Texas

primary_source.document_title: CITY COUNCIL AGENDA FOR THE MEETING AT 10:00 AM, TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 30, 2025

verbatim_notes: Every agenda item title, M&C number, resolution number, Council District reference, dollar amount, zoning case number, and procedural bracket heading in this excerpt is quoted verbatim from the official Fort Worth agenda PDF. No content is paraphrased, summarized, or reconstructed from secondary sources.
